response.justification: Strong senior fullstack candidate with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js fullstack work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates proficiency across the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), polyglot background (Java, C++, DLang, Python-adjacent), MongoDB experience, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong TDD/craftsmanship mindset that fits internal tooling work.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role matches a key requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, workshops, OSS founder)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms, NI era)
Vitest/Playwright not explicitly cited, though Jest-equivalent testing background is clear
